alerts.title: Khamenei reportedly insists enriched uranium must remain in Iran, contradicting leaked MoU
alerts.summary: Reuters exclusive (cited in global_metrics nuclear headlines) reports Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei told sources that Iran's enriched uranium stockpile must stay inside the country — directly contradicting the previously leaked MoU clause requiring HEU removal. The Jerusalem Post and Haaretz corroborate that US and Iranian negotiators are making contradicting public claims on the nuclear file with hours allegedly remaining before a deal. Breakout estimate remains ~1-2 weeks at 60% U-235.

alerts.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' Iran deal after signaling agreement was imminent
alerts.summary: BBC and Politico report Trump has instructed US negotiators not to rush into a deal with Iran, a marked walk-back from his earlier statement that the agreement — including reopening the Strait of Hormuz — was 'largely negotiated.' Fortune notes Iranian negotiators are growing more suspicious as US terms appear more generous, while ynetnews reports Trump privately assured Israel no deal would proceed without dismantling Iran's nuclear program.

alerts.title: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since ceasefire announcement
alerts.summary: Council on Foreign Relations and The Guardian report Israeli aircraft struck Beirut for the first time since the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire was announced, with separate bombardment reducing buildings to craters in southern Lebanon. The strike comes as IDF maintains a high alert level despite the potential US-Iran deal, per The Jerusalem Post, raising the risk of a renewed northern front.

alerts.title: Israeli strikes kill six-month-old, parents and Gaza police officers in single day
alerts.summary: Reuters, Haaretz, Al Jazeera and The National report a cluster of Israeli strikes across Gaza killed five police officers and a 13-year-old boy at a northern Gaza police post, a six-month-old infant and his parents in central Gaza, and three additional civilians including a one-year-old. The casualty surge coincides with Hamas being assessed as 'Degraded' but PIJ still 'Active' in global_metrics proxy tracking.

alerts.title: Japanese Terra A2 drone-interceptors reportedly deployed with Ukrainian forces in Kharkiv
alerts.summary: Rybar (~135K views) reports Japan's Terra Drone Corporation, jointly with Ukrainian WinnyLab LLC, has begun deploying the Terra A2 drone-interceptor in Ukraine — at minimum in Kharkiv oblast. The platform reportedly reaches 312 km/h with 75 km range and optional radar payload, follows the earlier Terra A1 anti-Shahed system, and marks deepening Japanese industrial involvement in the war. Ukrainian MoD separately claims Shahed shootdowns have doubled in four months (DeepState UA, ~192K views).

analysis_note: The US-Iran deal narrative is fracturing in real time — Khamenei's reported refusal to relinquish HEU and Trump's 'don't rush' reversal directly contradict the MoU terms leaked 24 hours earlier, even as Israel resumes strikes on Beirut and Gaza casualties mount.
